3134700.name: Ragdoll Rumble Original Soundtrack -Volume 1-
3134700.description:
This is volume 1 of the original soundtrack of the PC console game "Ragdoll Rumble”.

It includes the main title theme, 5 map level themes, and a one minute upbeat version of the five respective map themes.

Immerse yourself into Ragdoll Rumble’s fun, chaotic, and wizard-themed worldview with additional music content!

  • Full version of volume 1’s music demo video is currently available on YouTube for test-listening. Please visit the website link!

-

【Volume 1】

1. Witch’s Cauldron (Title Theme Ver.)

2. Hopscotch Isle

3. Hopscotch Isle (Upbeat Ver.)

4. Spin Dungeon

5. Spin Dungeon (Upbeat Ver.)

6. Spelleporter

7. Spelleporter (Upbeat Ver.)

8. Roller-Boulder Temple

9. Roller-Boulder Temple (Upbeat Ver.)

10. Blizzard Bridge

11. Blizzard Bridge (Upbeat Ver.)

-

All music is composed by 逆巻ネロ (Nero Sakamaki).

[Audio Formats Available for Download]

Normal audio: MP3 (44.1kHz, 320kb/s, stereo)

High quality audio: WAV (48 kHz, 24 bit, stereo)
